rh_conditions: Dry cup method (desiccant) per ASTM E96 Procedure A — 0% RH on one side, 50% RH on other side. Specimen conditioned at 73°F and 50% RH for 24 hours prior to test.
notes: 36-mil self-adhered polymer modified bitumen sheet membrane (SBS-modified with polyethylene facer). Classified as Class I Vapor Retarder per IRC/IBC (permeance <= 0.1 perms). Vapor permeance is not significantly temperature-dependent within the normal service range of 30-100°F. Used as combined water-resistive barrier and vapor retarder in wall assemblies and as roofing underlayment. Conforms to ASTM D1970. Permeance value applies to the intact sheet only — permeance at laps depends on sealant and overlap width, which are assembly-level considerations outside this kernel's scope.
